title: VPBA's Modpack
description: Designed specifically for our private Minecraft server, combining an array of performance, quality-of-life, and visual enhancement mods to elevate your gameplay experience.
body:
VBPA's Modpack is designed specifically for our private Minecraft server, combining an array of performance, quality-of-life, and visual enhancement mods to elevate your gameplay experience. This modpack includes popular optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and Distant Horizons to ensure maximum performance and seamless gameplay.

Additionally, VBPA's Modpack integrates quality-of-life improvements like Xaero's Minimap and World Map for better navigation, and visual enhancements through Iris for shader support. The pack also features Essential, a mod for enhanced social interaction and cosmetics, as well as Sound Physics Remastered for a more immersive audio experience.

For an enriched visual experience, the modpack comes pre-configured with the Complementary Unbound shader pack with Euphoria Patches and Simplista, a texture pack with PBR support.
